root.rep_text: หนังสือยืนยันยอด

confirm_date.text: เงินฝาก ณ วันที่

book_date.text: ให้ไว้ ณ วันที่

root.sql:
select 'This is to certify that '||trim(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name_eng(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no))||' one of our customers,' as paragraph_1 , ' has maintained Saving Account No. '||trim(sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno)||' with us since' as paragraph_2 , ' '||trim(pka_com_function.fp_get_month_name((extract (month from sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_opened_date))::int,'LE'))||' '||trim(extract(day from sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_opened_date)::text)|| ', '||trim(extract(year from sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_opened_date)::text)||'. The total balance at '||trim(pka_com_function.fp_get_month_name((extract (month from sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date))::int,'LE'))|| ' '||trim(extract(day from sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date)::text)||', '||trim(extract(year from sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date)::text)||', has an amount '||to_snumber((sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance)::bigint)as paragraph_3 , ' in baht currency. This amount of shares stated above can be converted and withdrawn'as paragraph_4 , ' into cash immediately upon request from the member.' as paragraph_5 , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '!book_no!'as book_no , '!book_date!'as book_date , sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!book_date!','SD')as day , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!book_date!','MM')as month , pka_com_function.fp_get_month_name((pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!book_date!','MM'))::int,'LE')as month_eng , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!book_date!','YYYY')::integer-543 as year , (select trim(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name_eng(membership_no)) from sc_hr_off_member where sc_hr_off_member.official_position = '008' )as manager_name_eng
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_cnt_m_coop , sc_cls_confirm_data , sc_dep_m_creditor where 1=1 and sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'DEP' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = '40' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance > 0 -- and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '045995' /*WHERE*/
